post.title: Simulated Annealing: From Physics to Optimization
post.description: Exploring the mathematical foundations of Simulated Annealing, showing how it emerges from fundamental principles of statistical mechanics and how theoretical results guarantee its convergence under certain conditions.
post.excerpt: Introduction The idea of Simulated Annealing (SA) has always fascinated me. I first heard about annealing in physics classes, then later saw…
